title: wolfSSHd RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-0930 is a potential read out of bounds case in wolfSSHd on Windows, with no patch available. This vulnerability poses a significant risk to internet-facing systems. Why now: Lack of patch availability increases the risk of exploitation. (confidence: 0.80)
